easy.title: Positive Number Validator

medium.title: Type-Strict Concatenator
medium.description: Write `concat(s1, s2)` raising `TypeError` if either is not str.

hard.title: Chain Exception Handler
hard.description: Catch KeyError when accessing dict and raise RuntimeError from it.

debugging.title: Fix Re-raise Syntax
debugging.buggyCode: except ValueError as e: raise e
bugs: Use bare `raise` to re-raise active exception preserving traceback.
